query:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT al.entity_id) as "count!"
        FROM activity_log al
        JOIN tasks t ON t.id = al.entity_id
        LEFT JOIN project_statuses ps ON ps.id = t.status_id
        WHERE al.user_id = $1
          AND al.entity_type = 'task'
          AND al.action = 'moved'
          AND al.created_at >= $2
          AND al.created_at <= $3
          AND ps.type = 'done'
